title: Sunseeker 86
description:
The 2009 Sunseeker 86 Yacht is a 27-metre British luxury motor yacht powered by twin Caterpillar C32 ACERT engines producing 1,825 HP each with a top speed of 32 knots and a range of 350 nautical miles.

Accommodating up to 10 guests across 5 suites, including a full-beam master suite plus 4 crew berths, she is equally suited for owner use or charter operation. Numerous upgrades throughout her comprehensive specification make her one of the finest examples available.

Currently located in Portugal and available for immediate viewing. Contact us for the full inventory and a private appointment.
